name: C2xSetTokenInt64
title: C2xSetTokenInt64
syntax: long C2xSetTokenInt64( long packet, char protocolDesignatorl[], char tokenDesignator[], int64 value ); // form 1
description: This function sets the integer value of a token.
Form 2 with byte offset sets a part of the token data as integer.

parameters.name: packet
parameters.description: Handle of a packet that has been created with C2xInitPacket
